response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory 5+ years of C++ development experience on Windows platforms and has no demonstrated experience in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income systems. While they have strong software development skills across multiple languages and domains, none align with the core requirements of the role.
strengths: Strong background in software development with diverse technical skills (C++, JavaScript, TypeScript, Dlang, etc.)
Experience with real-time systems, low-latency applications, and performance optimization
Active open-source contributor with project leadership and community engagement
concerns: No C++ experience on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
No domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income
